summary:
📋 Weekly Review — 2026-06-21

ISSUES FOUND
- ufc-dashboard: Empty-payload event (medic-vs-rodriguez) marked "fresh" despite no bouts parsed — silent extraction failure. Already tracked in open issue #14; no new file. (crypto, volleyball, overseer all healthy/idle — no bugs.)

TOP ENHANCEMENT IDEAS (ranked)
1. crypto-trading — Buy-and-hold benchmark + equity curve in overseer-status (effort: low, impact: high): turns +$14/100% win over 2 trades into real alpha-vs-holding.
2. ufc-dashboard — Line-movement alerts past a threshold (effort: low, impact: high): surfaces steam moves already computed but buried in JSON.
3. volleyball — Idle-footage nudge + drop-folder auto-detect (effort: low, impact: high): pipeline is fully idle (0 frames); closes the "works but unused" gap.
4. overseer — Push weekly digest to Slack/email (effort: low, impact: high): gets findings to your phone instead of sitting on the dashboard.
5. overseer — Persist status history + trend sparklines (effort: medium, impact: high): week-over-week memory so regressions become visible.
6. ufc-dashboard — Secondary odds source w/ fallback for empty payloads (effort: medium, impact: medium): directly mitigates the #14 failure + adds cross-book coverage.
7. crypto-trading — Log per-signal rejection reasons + slippage (effort: medium, impact: medium): explains why 4 of 6 signals didn't trade.
8. volleyball — Auto highlight clips w/ coaching tags (effort: high, impact: medium): ambitious; converts tracking data into rewatchable tagged clips.

Volleyball.reason: read OK but no recent activity / stale data
